## Root Cause Summary

Sometimes PMAX log bits are not asserted in opc_pkg_therm_status and package_therm_status when an IMH1 PMAX event is generated by modifying the PMAX DAC code or global_pmax_inject on IMH1:

BIOS OKSDREL1_86B_2026.16.3.01_0034.D25_8000099D_0.794.0_IPCleanExternal_NoTrace_DebugSigned

### Description
Sometimes PMAX log bits are not asserted in opc_pkg_therm_status and package_therm_status when an IMH1 PMAX event is generated by modifying the PMAX DAC code or global_pmax_inject on IMH1:

BIOS OKSDREL1_86B_2026.16.3.01_0034.D25_8000099D_0.794.0_IPCleanExternal_NoTrace_DebugSigned

def logs_test(i=10, imhNum = 0):

     import time

     imhTest = sv.socket0.imhs[imhNum]

     print(&quot;Initial state&quot;)

     collect_data()

     print()

     for x in range(i):

         print(&quot;---------Iteration: &quot;, x)

         imhTest.pcodeio_map.io_pmax_config.global_pmax_inject =1

         time.sleep(3)

         collect_data()

         print()

         # Clearing logs

         sv.socket0.imh0.punit.throttle.package_therm_status.pmax_log = 0

         sv.socket0.imh0.punit.ptpcfsms.ptpcfsms.opc_pkg_therm_status_log_clear.pmax_log = 1

def collect_data():

     print('opc_pkg_therm_status',sv.socket0.imh0.punit.ptpcfsms.ptpcfsms.opc_pkg_therm_status.pmax_log)

     print('package_therm_status',sv.socket0.imh0.punit.throttle.package_therm_status.pmax_log)
